steps.title: Identify the stated goal
steps.content: The goal is explicit: indicate the year the Schomburg Center was founded. This single criterion determines which note to emphasize.

steps.title: Apply the goal to the choices
steps.content:
The Schomburg Center was founded in 1925. states “The Schomburg Center was founded in 1925,” which directly indicates the year.

The other three options provide information about the center's name, nature as a research library, and location, respectively—none of which address the founding year.

This matches the correct answer — C is correct.
